---
id: r-hybrid
type: concept
title: Hybrid Retrieval Systems
tags: [retrieval, search]
---
Hybrid retrieval combines dense vector search with sparse lexical search
(BM25 or FTS) to capture both semantic and keyword signals. The two
rankings are typically fused with Reciprocal Rank Fusion or a weighted
combination. Hybrid systems outperform either alone on diverse queries.
